description: Returns a list of Recycled Action Plans for a given project.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[deleted_by_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a specific Deleted By ID or a range of Deleted By IDs.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Location ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Location ID or a range of Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[manager_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a specific Manager ID or a range of Manager ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[plan_type_id]
parameters.description: Action Plan Type ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Action Plan Type ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

created_at.description: Time the Action Plan was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Action Plan was deleted

deleted_by.description: Name of individual who deleted the Action Plan

description.description: Description of the Action Plan in rich text form

description_plain_text.description: Description of the Action Plan in plain text form

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

code.description: The unique code for this Location

first_name.description: First name of the Party Person

last_name.description: Last name of the Party Person

name.description: Full name of the Party Person

user_id.description: Login Information ID associated with the Party Person

is_employee.description: Indicates whether Party is an Employee of the current Company

login.description: Login Information associated with the Party Person

updated_at.description: Time the Party Person was updated

active.description: Flag indicating if Action Plan Type is intended for use

global.description: Flag indicating if Action Plan Status applies to all Companies

updated_at.description: Timestamp of when the Action Plan was updated
